message.content:
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam linetype ortho
skinparam shadowing false

title classes htmlElements

interface selfmapper {
  +add_self(self, self_ptr)
  +get_self(self, self_ptr_string)
}

class base_element {
  +STARTATTR_ONCLICK
  --
  +addClass(self, cls_name:str)
  +add_attributes(self, attr:dict)
  +appendChild(self, child:'base_element')
  +containsClass(self, cls_name:str)
  +getAttribute(self, k:str)
  +getInnerHTML(self)
  +getId(self)
  +getIndentName(self)
  +get_HTMLElement()
  +hasAttribute(self, k:str)
  +rem_attribute(self, attr:dict)
  +removeAllChildren(self)
  +removeAttribute(self, k:str)
  +removeClass(self, cls_name:str)
  +removeChild(self, child:'base_element')
  +replaceChild(self, new_child:'base_element', old_child:'base_element')
  +replaceClass(self, old_cls_name:str, new_cls_name:str)
  +setAttribute(self, k:str, v:str)
  +setInnerHTML(self, new_html:str)
  +setId(self, new_id:str)
  +setIndentName(self, new_indent:str)
  +toggleClass(self, cls_name:str)
  +toggleForceClass(self, cls_name:str, force:bool)
}

class ParentObjCouple {
  +obj
  +pos
}

class generic_element {
  +getAttribute(self, k:str)
  +hasAttribute(self, k:str)
  +__init__(self, base:'base_obj', msgdesc:base.MSGdesc_Type, msgdata:typing.Optional[base.MSGdata_Type])
  +removeAttribute(self, k:str)
  +setAttribute(self, k:str, v)
}

class element

class button
class h1
class h2
class h3
class p
class div
class span
class header
class footer
class spantext {
  +set_text(self, newtext:str)
}
class a
class img

class table {
  +sort_column
  --
  +columnsort(self, column:int)
  +get_header(self, selfstr)
  +rowmsg(self)
  +rowMsg(self, whfrom:base.base_obj, msgdesc:base.MSGdesc_Type, msgdata:typing.Optional[base.MSGdata_Type])
}

class tr {
  +getcells(self)
}
class th
class td
class col
class ul
class li

class label {
  +get_text(self)
  +set_text(self, labeltext:str)
}

class option

class select {
  +add_or_set_option(self, idstr:str, name:str)
  +get_selected(self)
  +has_option(self, idstr:str)
  +num_options(self)
}

class input {
  +getDataValue(self)
  +get_stringValue(self)
  +set_StringValue(self, newstr)
}

class input_list {
  +idstr
  --
  +addItem(self, el:input)
  +getDataValue(self)
}

class input_button
class input_submit

class textbutton
class h1text
class h2text
class h3text
class ptext
class textnode {
  +set_text(self, newtext:str)
}

class LEDElement {
  +BLUE
  +GREEN
  +RED
  +YELLOW
  +col
  +colnum
  --
  +setcolour(self, newcol:int)
  +stepcolour(self)
}

class alertbox {
  +txt
  --
  +set_text(self, newtext:str)
}

class spanhelptext
class spanerrortext

selfmapper <|.. base_element
base_element o-- ParentObjCouple
base_element <|-- generic_element
generic_element <|-- element

element <|-- button
element <|-- h1
element <|-- h2
element <|-- h3
element <|-- p
element <|-- div
element <|-- span
element <|-- header
element <|-- footer
element <|-- spantext
element <|-- a
element <|-- img
element <|-- table
element <|-- tr
element <|-- th
element <|-- td
element <|-- col
element <|-- ul
element <|-- li
element <|-- label
element <|-- option
element <|-- select
element <|-- input
element <|-- input_list
element <|-- input_button
element <|-- input_submit
element <|-- textnode
element <|-- LEDElement
element <|-- alertbox
element <|-- spanhelptext
element <|-- spanerrortext

button <|-- textbutton
h1 <|-- h1text
h2 <|-- h2text
h3 <|-- h3text
p <|-- ptext

spantext <|-- spanhelptext
spantext <|-- spanerrortext

input <|-- input_button
input <|-- input_submit

@enduml
